intro.speaker: Maya
intro.text_en: Hey, you made it! Welcome to the Astronomy Club.
intro.text_zh: 你来了！欢迎加入天文俱乐部。

intro.speaker: Maya
intro.text_en: Before we touch any telescope, we start with the oldest observing tool we have.
intro.text_zh: 在碰望远镜之前，我们先用最古老的观测工具。

intro.speaker: Maya
intro.text_en: Exactly. Tonight you'll learn how your eyes see the sky - and why astronomers build tools to see more.
intro.text_zh: 没错。今晚你会先了解眼睛如何看天空，也会明白为什么天文学家需要制造更多观测工具。

level_1_before.speaker: Maya
level_1_before.text_en: Let's begin without a telescope. The Moon is bright enough for your eyes.
level_1_before.text_zh: 我们先不用望远镜。月亮足够明亮，肉眼就能看到。

level_1_before.speaker: Maya
level_1_before.text_en: Try to find it, center it, and really look.
level_1_before.text_zh: 试着找到它，把它放到视野中间，认真看一看。

level_1_after.speaker: Maya
level_1_after.text_en: Nice. Your eyes collected light from the Moon and focused it on your retina.
level_1_after.text_zh: 很好。你的眼睛收集了来自月球的光，并把它聚焦在视网膜上。

level_1_after.speaker: Maya
level_1_after.text_en: But did you notice? You could see the Moon, but not much detail.
level_1_after.text_zh: 但你注意到了吗？你能看到月亮，却看不到太多细节。

level_1_after.speaker: Maya
level_1_after.text_zh: 这就是望远镜登场的原因。

level_2_before.speaker: Maya
level_2_before.text_en: Some stars are bright enough to find with your eyes. Others are too faint.
level_2_before.text_zh: 有些星星足够亮，肉眼可以找到。另一些就太暗了。

level_2_before.speaker: Maya
level_2_before.text_en: Polaris sits toward the north. See if you can catch it.
level_2_before.text_zh: 北极星在北边。看看你能不能找到它。

level_2_after.speaker: Maya
level_2_after.text_en: Your eyes are amazing, but they're small light collectors.
level_2_after.text_zh: 眼睛很了不起，但它能收集的光很有限。

level_2_after.speaker: Maya
level_2_after.text_en: If we want more detail, we need a bigger light collector.
level_2_after.text_zh: 如果想看到更多细节，我们需要更大的集光工具。

level_2_after.speaker: Maya
level_2_after.text_en: The parts cabinet is open. Tomorrow night, we build.
level_2_after.text_zh: 零件柜已经打开了。下一晚，我们动手组装。

level_3_before_assembly.speaker: Maya
level_3_before_assembly.text_en: This is a refractor telescope. The front lens collects light.
level_3_before_assembly.text_zh: 这是一台折射望远镜。前端的物镜收集光线。

level_3_before_assembly.speaker: Maya
level_3_before_assembly.text_en: The eyepiece helps your eye inspect the image. Let's build it together.
level_3_before_assembly.text_zh: 目镜帮助眼睛观察被放大的图像。我们一起把它装起来。

level_3_after.speaker: Maya
level_3_after.text_en: You just built your first telescope.
level_3_after.text_zh: 你刚刚组装了第一台望远镜。

level_3_after.speaker: Maya
level_3_after.text_en: Now look at the Moon again. Same Moon, better tool.
level_3_after.text_zh: 现在再看看月亮。同一个月亮，不同的工具。

level_4_before_focus.speaker: Maya
level_4_before_focus.text_en: The telescope is built, but the image may still be blurry. That doesn't mean it's broken.
level_4_before_focus.text_zh: 望远镜装好了，但图像可能仍然模糊。这不代表它坏了。

level_4_before_focus.speaker: Maya
level_4_before_focus.text_en: Turning the focus knob moves the eyepiece until the image lines up with your eye.
level_4_before_focus.text_zh: 转动调焦旋钮，会移动目镜位置，直到图像和你的眼睛对齐。

level_4_after.speaker: Maya
level_4_after.text_en: There it is. You didn't just look - you adjusted the instrument.
level_4_after.text_zh: 看到了吧。你不只是观看，你调整了仪器。

level_5_before.speaker: Maya
level_5_before.text_en: New observers often chase the highest magnification. It feels powerful - but it has a cost.
level_5_before.text_zh: 新手常常追求最高倍率。听起来很强，但它有代价。

level_5_after.speaker: Maya
level_5_after.text_en: Power is useful only when the view stays clear.
level_5_after.text_zh: 只有图像还能保持清楚时，倍率才有意义。

level_6_before.speaker: Maya
level_6_before.text_en: Now that your telescope zooms in, finding targets gets harder.
level_6_before.text_zh: 现在你的望远镜能放大了，但找目标反而更难了。

level_6_before.speaker: Maya
level_6_before.text_en: That's why observers use a finder scope.
level_6_before.text_zh: 这就是为什么观测者会使用寻星镜。

level_6_after.speaker: Maya
level_6_after.text_en: Wide view to find. Narrow view to study.
level_6_after.text_zh: 宽视野用来找目标，窄视野用来看细节。

level_7_before_assembly.speaker: Maya
level_7_before_assembly.text_en: Lenses are not the only way to gather light.
level_7_before_assembly.text_zh: 透镜不是收集光线的唯一方法。

level_7_before_assembly.speaker: Maya
level_7_before_assembly.text_en: Some telescopes use mirrors. Tonight, you'll meet the Newtonian reflector.
level_7_before_assembly.text_zh: 有些望远镜使用镜子。今晚，你会认识牛顿反射望远镜。

level_7_after.speaker: Maya
level_7_after.text_en: Mirrors let us build larger light collectors. That matters when targets are faint.
level_7_after.text_zh: 镜子让我们能制造更大的集光工具。观测暗目标时，这非常重要。

level_8_before.speaker: Maya
level_8_before.text_en: The Orion Nebula is not like the Moon. It's faint. You need light, not just magnification.
level_8_before.text_zh: 猎户座大星云不像月亮。它很暗。你需要的是光，而不只是倍率。

level_8_after.speaker: Maya
level_8_after.text_en: You collected more light, and the nebula started to appear.
level_8_after.text_zh: 你收集了更多光，星云才开始显现。

level_9_before.speaker: Maya
level_9_before.text_en: Andromeda is far beyond our galaxy. It won't look dramatic at first.
level_9_before.text_zh: 仙女座远在银河系之外。它一开始不会显得很震撼。

level_9_before.speaker: Maya
level_9_before.text_en: But finding it means you're becoming an observer.
level_9_before.text_zh: 但能找到它，说明你正在成为真正的观测者。

level_9_after.speaker: Maya
level_9_after.text_en: Tonight, you joined the club. Now you've earned your place in the logbook.
level_9_after.text_zh: 今晚你加入了俱乐部。现在，你已经值得把名字写进观测日志了。

level_10_before.speaker: Maya
level_10_before.text_en: Same Jupiter, new question: how much power is too much?
level_10_before.text_zh: 还是木星，但问题变了：多高的倍率算太高？

level_10_before.speaker: Maya
level_10_before.text_en: You can see Jupiter now. Push the power higher - and watch what it costs.
level_10_before.text_zh: 你已经能看到木星了。把倍率推高试试——看看代价是什么。

level_10_after.speaker: Maya
level_10_after.text_en: Bigger is not clearer. You proved it yourself tonight.
level_10_after.text_zh: 更大不等于更清楚。今晚你亲手证明了。

level_11_before.speaker: Maya
level_11_before.text_en: Mars again - but tonight it hugs the horizon.
level_11_before.text_zh: 又是火星——但今晚它贴着地平线。

level_11_before.speaker: Maya
level_11_before.text_en: Mars is low tonight. If it looks mushy, that's the air - not your telescope.
level_11_before.text_zh: 今晚火星很低。如果看起来糊糊的，那是大气的问题——不是你的望远镜坏了。

level_11_after.speaker: Maya
level_11_after.text_en: Low targets swim in thick air. Less power, steadier view.
level_11_after.text_zh: 低空目标泡在厚厚的大气里。倍率低一点，画面稳一点。

level_12_before.speaker: Maya
level_12_before.text_en: Back to the Moon - the one target that rewards high power.
level_12_before.text_zh: 回到月亮——唯一奖励高倍率的目标。

level_12_before.speaker: Maya
level_12_before.text_en: The Moon is bright enough to take the power. But every new eyepiece needs a new focus.
level_12_before.text_zh: 月亮够亮，扛得住高倍率。但每换一个目镜，都要重新调焦。

level_12_after.speaker: Maya
level_12_after.text_en: Same rule, different target: brightness pays for power.
level_12_after.text_zh: 同一条规则，不同的目标：亮度为倍率买单。

level_13_before.speaker: Maya
level_13_before.text_en: Your call tonight. Pick a target, pick the power. I'm just watching.
level_13_before.text_zh: 今晚你说了算。选目标，选倍率。我只旁观。

level_13_after.speaker: Maya
level_13_after.text_en: You chose like an observer, not a beginner. Chapter logged.
level_13_after.text_zh: 你的选择像个观测者，而不是新手了。本章记入日志。

level_13_after.speaker: Maya
level_13_after.text_en: Magnification Mastery is yours. Next up: finding things in the first place.
level_13_after.text_zh: 「倍率掌握」徽章归你了。接下来：学会怎么先找到目标。

level_14_before.speaker: Maya
level_14_before.text_en: Mars a third time - but tonight you navigate by numbers, not by luck.
level_14_before.text_zh: 第三次找火星——但今晚靠数字导航，不靠运气。

level_14_before.speaker: Maya
level_14_before.text_en: No guessing tonight. Two numbers will take you to Mars: azimuth and altitude.
level_14_before.text_zh: 今晚不用猜。两个数字就能带你找到火星：方位角和俯仰角。

level_14_after.speaker: Maya
level_14_after.text_en: Coordinates turned the whole sky into an address book.
level_14_after.text_zh: 坐标把整个天空变成了一本地址簿。

level_15_before.speaker: Maya
level_15_before.text_en: A finder fresh out of the box lies a little. Let's teach it to point true.
level_15_before.text_zh: 刚装上的寻星镜会撒点小谎。我们来教它指准。

level_15_before.speaker: Maya
level_15_before.text_en: Center a bright star in the main scope, then nudge the finder until it agrees.
level_15_before.text_zh: 先在主镜里把一颗亮星居中，再微调寻星镜直到它也对准。

level_15_after.speaker: Maya
level_15_after.text_en: Now your wide eye and your narrow eye agree.
level_15_after.text_zh: 现在你的'宽眼睛'和'窄眼睛'终于一致了。

level_16_before.speaker: Maya
level_16_before.text_en: Feeling confident? Try finding it with the main scope alone.
level_16_before.text_zh: 自信满满？那就试试只用主望远镜找它。

level_16_mid.speaker: Maya
level_16_mid.text_en: Lost? Everyone gets lost in six degrees. Wide first, narrow last.
level_16_mid.text_zh: 迷路了吧？在 6 度的视野里谁都会迷路。先宽后窄。

level_16_after.speaker: Maya
level_16_after.text_en: The narrow field shows detail. The wide field shows the way.
level_16_after.text_zh: 窄视野看细节，宽视野认路。

level_17_before.speaker: Maya
level_17_before.text_en: Tonight I stay by the door. The sky is yours.
level_17_before.text_zh: 今晚我就站在门口。天空交给你了。

level_17_after.speaker: Maya
level_17_after.text_en: You navigated alone. That's the real badge.
level_17_after.text_zh: 你独立完成了导航。这才是真正的徽章。

level_17_after.speaker: Maya
level_17_after.text_en: Sky Navigator, logged. Next, we chase the faint stuff.
level_17_after.text_zh: 「星空导航」记入日志。接下来，我们要去追暗弱的天体了。

level_18_before.speaker: Maya
level_18_before.text_en: Same nebula as L7 - but tonight we change what 'success' means.
level_18_before.text_zh: 还是那片星云——但今晚我们改变'成功'的定义。

level_18_before.speaker: Maya
level_18_before.text_en: A nebula never gives you sharp edges. Tonight, a faint smudge IS the victory.
level_18_before.text_zh: 星云永远不会给你清晰的边缘。今晚，看到淡淡的一团就是胜利。

level_18_after.speaker: Maya
level_18_after.text_en: You saw light that traveled 1,300 years. Blurry, and still beautiful.
level_18_after.text_zh: 你看到了跋涉 1300 年的光。虽然模糊，依然动人。

level_19_before.speaker: Maya
level_19_before.text_en: Third visit to Orion - this time as a controlled experiment.
level_19_before.text_zh: 第三次看猎户座星云——这次是一场对照实验。

level_19_before.speaker: Maya
level_19_before.text_en: Same sky, same nebula. Only one thing changes tonight: how much light you collect.
level_19_before.text_zh: 同样的天空，同样的星云。今晚只改变一件事：你收集多少光。

level_19_after.speaker: Maya
level_19_after.text_en: Last night a smudge, tonight a shape. That difference is aperture.
level_19_after.text_zh: 昨晚是一团斑，今晚有了形状。这个差别，就叫口径。

level_20_before.speaker: Maya
level_20_before.text_en: Andromeda again - but the enemy tonight is streetlights, not distance.
level_20_before.text_zh: 又是仙女座——但今晚的敌人是路灯，不是距离。

level_20_before.speaker: Maya
level_20_before.text_en: Andromeda is huge - and the city lights are eating it alive.
level_20_before.text_zh: 仙女座星系很大——但城市的灯光正在活活吞掉它。

level_20_after.speaker: Maya
level_20_after.text_en: Nothing was broken tonight. The sky itself was the problem. Log it honestly.
level_20_after.text_zh: 今晚没有任何设备坏掉。问题出在天空本身。如实记录下来。

level_21_before.speaker: Maya
level_21_before.text_en: The club drove out past the hills tonight. Same gear. Darker sky. Try again.
level_21_before.text_zh: 今晚俱乐部开车到了山那边。设备没变，天更暗了。再试一次。

level_21_after.speaker: Maya
level_21_after.text_en: Your telescope didn't improve overnight - your sky did.
level_21_after.text_zh: 你的望远镜一夜之间没有变好——变好的是你的天空。

level_21_after.speaker: Maya
level_21_after.text_en: Deep Sky Observer, logged. Now let's talk about why the sky keeps moving.
level_21_after.text_zh: 「深空观测者」记入日志。接下来，我们聊聊为什么天空一直在转。

level_22_before.speaker: Maya
level_22_before.text_en: Watch closely. The star is running away - no, the Earth is turning under you.
level_22_before.text_zh: 盯紧了。星星在慢慢逃——不，是地球在你脚下转。

level_22_after.speaker: Maya
level_22_after.text_en: You just fought the planet's spin by hand. Feel the workout?
level_22_after.text_zh: 你刚才在徒手对抗地球自转。感觉到工作量了吧？

level_23_before.speaker: Maya
level_23_before.text_en: Jupiter, fourth time - but tonight you don't touch the keys.
level_23_before.text_zh: 第四次看木星——但今晚你的手可以离开按键。

level_23_before.speaker: Maya
level_23_before.text_en: Tired arms? This mount turns at exactly the speed of the sky.
level_23_before.text_zh: 手酸了吧？这个支架会以和天空完全相同的速度转动。

level_23_after.speaker: Maya
level_23_after.text_en: Now the machine fights the spin, and you just watch.
level_23_after.text_zh: 现在由机器对抗自转，你只管看。

level_24_before.speaker: Maya
level_24_before.text_en: One last lesson: deep sky rewards the patient. Stay with her.
level_24_before.text_zh: 最后一课：深空回报有耐心的人。陪着她，别走开。

level_24_before.speaker: Maya
level_24_before.text_en: Every trick you've learned - aperture, dark sky, tracking - comes together tonight.
level_24_before.text_zh: 口径、暗空、追踪——你学过的每一招，今晚都要用上。

level_24_after.speaker: Maya
level_24_after.text_en: From naked eyes to a tracked deep-sky watch - you finished the whole path. Senior Observer.
level_24_after.text_zh: 从肉眼到追踪深空——整条路你走完了。高级观测员。

level_24_after.speaker: Maya
level_24_after.text_en: You started by looking at the Moon with just your eyes. Look at you now.
level_24_after.text_zh: 你当初只是用肉眼看了看月亮。看看你现在。

level_24_after.speaker: Maya
level_24_after.text_en: Every telescope you built, every focus you turned, every faint smudge you found - it all led here.
level_24_after.text_zh: 你组装的每一台望远镜，转过的每一次调焦，找到的每一团淡斑——都通向了这里。

level_24_after.speaker: Maya
level_24_after.text_en: The club is proud of you. Welcome to Senior Observer status.
level_24_after.text_zh: 俱乐部为你骄傲。欢迎成为高级观测员。

level_24_after.speaker: Maya
level_24_after.text_en: The sky doesn't end here. Keep looking up.
level_24_after.text_zh: 天空的故事不会到此为止。继续抬头看吧。

1.en: Start with your eyes. Every astronomer begins by learning how to see.
1.zh: 先用眼睛。每个天文学家都是从学会观看开始的。

2.en: Bright stars first. Learn what your eyes can and cannot do.
2.zh: 先找亮星。了解眼睛能做什么、不能做什么。

3.en: Time to build. The objective collects, the eyepiece magnifies.
3.zh: 该动手组装了。物镜收集光，目镜放大图像。

4.en: Blurry is not broken. Turn the knob until it's sharp.
4.zh: 模糊不等于坏了。转动旋钮直到清晰。

5.en: More power is not always more detail.
5.zh: 更高倍率不等于更多细节。

6.zh: 宽视野找目标，窄视野看细节。

7.en: Mirrors gather light too - often more of it.
7.zh: 镜子也能收集光，而且往往收集得更多。

8.en: Faint targets need light buckets, not zoom.
8.zh: 暗目标需要接光桶，而不是放大镜。

9.en: One last target. Make the logbook proud.
9.zh: 最后一个目标。让观测日志为你骄傲。

10.en: Same Jupiter, new question: how much power is too much?
10.zh: 还是木星，但问题变了：多高的倍率算太高？

11.en: Mars again - but tonight it hugs the horizon. Low power, steadier view.
11.zh: 又是火星——但今晚它贴着地平线。倍率低一点，画面稳一点。

12.en: Back to the Moon - bright enough to take high power, if you refocus first.
12.zh: 回到月亮——够亮能扛高倍率，但要先重新调焦。

13.en: Your call tonight. Pick a target, pick the power. No hints.
13.zh: 今晚你说了算。选目标，选倍率。没有提示。

14.en: Mars a third time - but tonight you navigate by numbers, not by luck.
14.zh: 第三次找火星——但今晚靠数字导航，不靠运气。

15.en: Teach the finder scope to point true before you trust it.
15.zh: 先教会寻星镜指准，再信任它。

16.en: Tempted to skip the finder? Six degrees is a big place to get lost in.
16.zh: 想跳过寻星镜？6 度视野足够让人迷路。

17.en: No hints tonight. Navigate the whole workflow alone.
17.zh: 今晚没有提示。独立完成整套导航流程。

18.en: Same nebula as L7 - but tonight a faint smudge already counts as success.
18.zh: 还是那片星云——但今晚看到淡淡的一团就算成功。

19.en: Third visit to Orion - this time as a controlled experiment in aperture.
19.zh: 第三次看猎户座星云——这次是一场关于口径的对照实验。

20.en: Andromeda again - but the enemy tonight is streetlights, not distance.
20.zh: 又是仙女座——但今晚的敌人是路灯，不是距离。

21.en: Same gear, darker sky. See what a dark sky alone can do.
21.zh: 设备不变，天空更暗。看看纯靠暗天空能带来什么变化。

22.en: The Earth keeps turning under you. Keep the star centered as it drifts.
22.zh: 地球一直在你脚下转动。星星漂移时持续把它保持居中。

23.en: Jupiter, fourth time - but tonight the tracking mount does the work.
23.zh: 第四次看木星——但今晚由追踪支架代劳。

24.en: The final watch. Hold Andromeda steady and finish the whole path.
24.zh: 最后一次观测。稳住仙女座，走完整条路。
